---
description: Implement tasks from an OpenSpec change (Experimental)
---

## Alias of **`/skillgrid-apply`**

Open and follow **`skillgrid-apply.md`**. It embeds the **`openspec instructions apply --change "<name>" --json`** loop plus Skillgrid PRD / `tasks.md` sync rules.

## Completion report (required)

Use the **Completion report** at the end of **`/skillgrid-apply`**: what you did, token usage if the product shows it (else **`Token usage: not shown in this environment`**), and suggested next (**typically `/skillgrid-test`**).
